creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat May 24 02:18:59 2014
New Revision: 354973
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354973
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354973/

Log:
  Ruby library for Windows Remote Management
  
  WWW: https://github.com/WinRb/WinRM
  
  PR:		ports/189435
  Submitted by:	Joseph Benden <joe@thrallingpenguin.com>

Added:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/
  head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/Makefile

Modified: head/sysutils/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/Makefile	Sat May 24 02:13:28 2014	(r354972)
+++ head/sysutils/Makefile	Sat May 24 02:18:59 2014	(r354973)
@@ -823,6 +823,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sys-uname
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sys-uptime
     SUBDIR += rubygem-teamocil
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-winrm
     SUBDIR += rubygem-yell
     SUBDIR += runit
     SUBDIR += runwhen

Added: head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/Makefile	Sat May 24 02:18:59 2014	(r354973)
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Created by: Joseph Benden <joe@thrallingpenguin.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	winrm
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.3
+CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	joe@thrallingpenguin.com
+COMMENT=	Library for Windows Remote Management
+
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-gssapi>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/security/rubygem-gssapi \
+		rubygem-httpclient>=2.3.3:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-httpclient \
+		rubygem-logging>=1.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-logging \
+		rubygem-nokogiri>=1.6.1:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/rubygem-nokogiri \
+		rubygem-rubyntlm01>=0.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-rubyntlm01 \
+		rubygem-savon>=0.9.5:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-savon \
+		rubygem-uuidtools>=2.1.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-uuidtools
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/distinfo	Sat May 24 02:18:59 2014	(r354973)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/winrm-1.1.3.gem) = 746dd6159e0c4f5e4058a2a9b7e0cc390f83d3e896ba0ccf14abc590947fb9d8
+SIZE (rubygem/winrm-1.1.3.gem) = 20480

Added: head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-winrm/pkg-descr	Sat May 24 02:18:59 2014	(r354973)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Ruby library for Windows Remote Management
+
+WWW: https://github.com/WinRb/WinRM
